title: Tragacantha teheranica
intro: Tragacantha teheranica, also known as Astragalus teheranicus, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the Fabaceae family, commonly found in mountainous regions. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its ability to boost the immune system, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant and anti-cancer activities. The bioactive constituents of Tragacantha teheranica include flavonoids, saponins, and alkaloids, which are responsible for its pharmacological effects. In traditional medicine, Tragacantha teheranica is often prepared as a tea or dried extract, and is also used in combination with other herbs to create tonics and capsules that are used to treat a variety of health conditions.
